---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: [enhancement]
assignees: []
---

## Describe Changes

- What is changing?
- Why is it changing?
- What API surface, generated client, or docs are affected?

## Checklist

- [ ] Affects API?
- [ ] Spec updated?
- [ ] Generated code refreshed with `./api/scripts/gen-all.sh` if the spec changed?

## Notes

- Link related issue or PRs here.
- Call out any breaking changes or rollout notes.
